creator: martin.jakob@gmx.com
text:
since a few days, i get the error below when i make buildworld. a second run with the same code revision, completes without an error.

uname -a:
FreeBSD betablock 14.0-STABLE FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE stable/14-c39254c8f GENERIC amd64


---
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://bugs.freebsd.org/submit/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
